overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an armored hunter wading through a shallow tropical jungle river. The character progresses from an open palm-tree area into a narrow canyon with ancient stone ruins, passing another hunter on a bird-like mount, and approaches a small waterfall at the canyon's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical jungle river with palm trees and ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: wading steadily through shallow water in an open jungle river, moving toward a narrowing canyon

entered.detail: tall tropical palm trees lining the riverbanks with dense green fronds
weathered stone wall covered in moss and vines along the left bank
dense overhead tree cover filtering bright sunlight
moss-covered rocky shoreline with tropical undergrowth

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide tropical jungle river with the character wading through clear shallow water. Tall palm trees and dense vegetation surround the area, with ancient stone ruins visible on the left bank. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character moves toward a narrowing section of the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow jungle canyon with hanging vines and steep rock walls

events.description: another hunter riding a bird-like mount passes from left to right across the river

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrowing water canyon as the walls rise on both sides

notable_agents.action: hunter in red armor riding a bird-like mount crosses from left to right through the water

entered.detail: steep moss-covered rock wall rising on the right side of the canyon
thick vines dangling from the canyon ceiling across the water
distant opening between the canyon walls with light filtering through

segments.scene_description: The river narrows into a steep-walled canyon where hanging vines drape across the water. Another hunter mounted on a large bird-like creature passes by from left to right. The ancient ruins and palm trees of the open jungle fall behind as the character moves deeper into the enclosed rocky passage.

events.description: small waterfall becomes visible at the end of the canyon ahead

agents.ego_description: wading toward the waterfall at the canyon's end while observing the mounted hunter on the right

notable_agents.action: mounted hunter waiting stationary on a rocky outcrop near the waterfall

entered.detail: small cascading waterfall flowing down rocks at the canyon's end
flat stone platform at the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens slightly to reveal a waterfall at the terminus. The mounted hunter waits on a rocky outcrop to the right. The character approaches the cascading water as the canyon walls loom close on both sides, with the waterfall marking the end of the navigable path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit tropical river into the enclosed depths of a rocky canyon ending at a waterfall. It begins with the character wading through clear shallow water surrounded by tall palm trees and dense vegetation, with ancient stone ruins lining the left bank. As the character progresses, the river narrows into a steep-walled canyon where hanging vines drape across the water and a mounted hunter on a bird-like creature passes by. The scene then shifts deeper into the enclosed rocky passage, leaving the open jungle behind as the walls loom closer on both sides. Finally, the canyon opens slightly to reveal a cascading waterfall at the terminus, where the mounted hunter waits on a rocky outcrop.
